keynotes.text: KENT'S NEW REMEDIES Présenté par le Dr Robert Séror CHARACTERISTIC SYMPTOMS Arnica : He goes into a rage when he sees the doctor, saying : "Go home, I am not sick, I did not send for you ." ( Apis ). Arsenicum : She cannot go to sleep because things in her room are out of place, and the room is not tidy. Calcarea Ars . : Headache goes to the side not lain on . Camphora : When the fever is present or when there are pains in the abdomen he covers up, but after these (both fever and pains) pass the skin becomes cold and be, uncovers. Camphor only. Camphora : Vomiting and purging with cold, blue, dry skin. Cuprum : Sudden blindness followed by convulsions , Kali. Ars . : Copious, thin, brown, horribly offensive, acrid leucorrhea . Lycopodium : Deep furrows in forehead and face with flapping nostrils in pneumonia or bronchitis . Lycopodium : Old misers with wrinkled faces, when they get sick need Lycopodium . Phosphorus : Patients in low fever want to be mesmerized, they are starving for vital energy. Sometimes Calcarea . Selenium : Shining face, impotency, prostatic dribbling . Staphysagria : Headache with ball in forehead and hollowness in occiput . Stramonium : Eyes fixed upon dark side of the room away from the light ; violent speech with wrinkled face. Sulphur : Always theorizing - Apis, Cannabis Ind . (Copy these into your Materia Medica so as to have them where you can find them when needed.)
